since_last: 50% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -2.32% · Gold -0.64% · Nasdaq100 -2.60%. 50% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.59%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.59%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +5.58%, IBM +4.91%, NET +4.62%, NOW +4.06%, MGNI +3.84%. Laggards: MU -10.06%, KLAC -9.40%, LRCX -9.38%, VRT -9.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.58% at $163.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
